title: (Bullish Signal) MX, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 03, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that MX's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. A.I.dvisor backtested 76 similar cases where MX's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 69 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $20.83 is above $18.21 the highest resistance line found by A.I. Throughout the month of 01/29/21 - 03/03/21, the price experienced a +26% Uptrend. During the week of 02/24/21 - 03/03/21, the stock enjoyed a +13% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/dv4g588882l61.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=f31244a27d672318610e497882b2ca7ea41eb6bf

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 48 of 56 cases where MX's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

MX moved above its 50-day Moving Average on January 06, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for MX crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on January 08, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. In 14 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The 50-day Moving Average for MX moved above the 200-day moving average on September 14, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +7.46% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MX advanced for three days, in 226 of 294 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. In 162 of 212 cases where MX Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 76%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9667936-magnachip-semiconductor-mx-21-48-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-mar-03-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
